description_long: This is an ornate, vintage cash register made primarily of metal with intricate floral and scrollwork engravings covering its exterior. The front features several vertical rows of round, mechanical keys, each labeled with numbers or symbols, and a prominent handle on the right side for operating the register. Above the keys, there is a display window with black and red indicators for transaction amounts, and a decorative panel with embossed text. The left side has a large, rounded compartment, likely housing the register's mechanical components, and the base is broad and sturdy with additional decorative motifs. A pull-out cash drawer is visible at the bottom front, and the overall finish is a tarnished, aged metallic gray. The object exudes a sense of historical craftsmanship and would be found in an old-fashioned shop or urban antique setting.
description: An ornate, vintage metal cash register with intricate engravings, mechanical keys, and a prominent handle, featuring a display window and a pull-out cash drawer.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the large, rounded compartment and detailed floral engravings, with the handle and some keys partially visible.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the decorative back panel with embossed text, the display window, and the side compartment, emphasizing the register's ornate design.
description_view_2: The right side view reveals the mechanical handle, more intricate engravings, and the curvature of the side housing, with the keys and display partially visible.
description_view_3: The front view displays the full array of mechanical keys, the display window, the handle on the right, and the pull-out cash drawer at the base.
attribute_keypad_layout: Five vertical rows of round mechanical keys, each labeled with numbers or symbols, arranged in columns.
